The story of *[Maria Marten](/wiki/Maria_Marten "Maria Marten")* was a popular stage [melodrama](/wiki/Melodrama "Melodrama") of the [Victorian era](/wiki/Victorian_era "Victorian era"), and five films based on the story were made between 1902 and 1935.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

1913 film

| Maria Marten, or the Mystery of the Red Barn | |
| --- | --- |
| Directed by | [Maurice Elvey](/wiki/Maurice_Elvey "Maurice Elvey") |
| Written by | Maurice Elvey |
| Produced by | Motograph Film Company |
| Starring | * [Elisabeth Risdon](/wiki/Elisabeth_Risdon "Elisabeth Risdon") * [Fred Groves](/wiki/Fred_Groves_(actor) "Fred Groves (actor)") * [Douglas Payne](/wiki/Douglas_Payne "Douglas Payne") * Nessie Blackford * A. G. Ogden * Mary McKenzie * Maurice Elvey |
| Distributed by | Motograph Film Company |
| Release date | * December 1913 (1913-12) |
| Running time | 3 [reels](/wiki/Reel#Motion_picture_terminology "Reel"); 869 feet |
| Country | United Kingdom |
| Language | [Silent](/wiki/Silent_film "Silent film") |

***Maria Marten, or the Mystery of the Red Barn*** is a 1913 British [silent](/wiki/Silent_film "Silent film") [drama film](/wiki/Drama_film "Drama film") directed by [Maurice Elvey](/wiki/Maurice_Elvey "Maurice Elvey").[[1]](#cite_note-BFI-info-1) It was based on the 1827 [Red Barn Murder](/wiki/Red_Barn_Murder "Red Barn Murder"). The story of *[Maria Marten](/wiki/Maria_Marten "Maria Marten")* was a popular stage [melodrama](/wiki/Melodrama "Melodrama") of the [Victorian era](/wiki/Victorian_era "Victorian era"), and five films based on the story were made between 1902 and 1935.

As of August 2010, the film is missing from the [BFI National Archive](/wiki/BFI_National_Archive "BFI National Archive"), and is listed as one of the [British Film Institute](/wiki/British_Film_Institute "British Film Institute")'s "[75 Most Wanted](/wiki/BFI_75_Most_Wanted "BFI 75 Most Wanted")" [lost films](/wiki/Lost_films "Lost films").[[2]](#cite_note-BFI-2)

## Plot

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Maria_Marten,_or_the_Mystery_of_the_Red_Barn&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Plot")]

A [Suffolk](/wiki/Suffolk "Suffolk") squire murders a young pregnant woman who had demanded that he must marry her.

## Cast

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Maria_Marten,_or_the_Mystery_of_the_Red_Barn&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Cast")]

* [Elisabeth Risdon](/wiki/Elisabeth_Risdon "Elisabeth Risdon") as Maria Marten
* [Fred Groves](/wiki/Fred_Groves_(actor) "Fred Groves (actor)") as William Corder
* [Douglas Payne](/wiki/Douglas_Payne "Douglas Payne") as Roger Deaves
* Nessie Blackford as Mary Marten
* A. G. Ogden as Tom Marten
* Mary McKenzie as Mary Moore
* [Maurice Elvey](/wiki/Maurice_Elvey "Maurice Elvey") as Captain Matthews
